spec.name: The Diverging Paths
spec.description: You are standing on a small plateau in the mountains, just south of a ridge that leads northwards through the rocky area. To the east, south, and west are gentle slopes leading down into different areas of the mountains. A giant, dark peak looks down over you to the west, looking quite spooky indeed!

extra_descs.description: The three sets of tracks split up here, one west, one east, one south.
